warm_up: Review top error from last session: gender.
focus: Reflexive verbs: practise the most common reflexive verbs (sich erinnern, sich vorstellen, sich setzen) with their required pronouns (mich/dich/sich), as omitting the reflexive pronoun is a recurring structural gap.
speaking_prompt: You sit down at a classic Viennese Kaffeehaus. Maria comes to your table. Order a Melange or Verlängerter and a pastry. She speaks quickly — keep up and be polite.
carry_forward_errors: das Internet (was: was ist der Internet?) — session 2026-04-21
danke für die Hilfe (was: danke für der Hilfe) — session 2026-04-21
